addr.description: TCP listen address for the HTTP transport.

path.description: HTTP path the MCP endpoint is served on.

stateless.description: Serve without server-side session state (for load-balanced proxies).

json_response.description: Return application/json responses instead of an SSE stream.

trust_proxy.description: Trust a fronting reverse/MCP proxy: disables Host-header DNS-rebinding protection.

allowed_origins.description: Trusted browser Origins for cross-origin requests. Empty = default protection; ["*"] = disable cross-origin protection.

identity_file.description: Path to a private key file (~ is expanded).

use_agent.description: Use the SSH agent at $SSH_AUTH_SOCK for authentication.

known_hosts_file.description: known_hosts file for host-key verification (~ is expanded). Defaults to ~/.ssh/known_hosts.

insecure_ignore_host_key.description: Disable host-key verification (INSECURE; for trusted networks/testing only).

name.description: Server name advertised to MCP clients.

version.description: Server version advertised to MCP clients.

uri.description: MongoDB connection string (mongodb:// or mongodb+srv://). Supports ${ENV_VAR} expansion. With ssh set

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this source is for; shown by listSources so a model can pick the right one.

default_database.description: Database used when a tool call omits the database argument.

connect_timeout.description: Connection/ping timeout as a Go duration (e.g. 10s). Default 10s.

operation_timeout.description: Per-operation timeout as a Go duration (e.g. 30s). Default 30s; "0s" disables.

$schema.description: Optional path or URL to the JSON Schema for this file (ignored at runtime).

server.description: MCP server identity reported to clients.

http.description: Streamable HTTP transport settings (used with --transport http).

sources.description: Named MongoDB connections keyed by a logical source name.
